category_sources: source_facts.description says it is a fork/variant of NetHack; official homepage describes SLASH'EM as a NetHack variant and roguelike single-player RPG.
display_name_sources: Official homepage title and SourceForge project page use SLASH'EM.
docs_sources: Official homepage provides project overview, downloads, development links, site help, and release information; no separate dedicated docs surface was identified.
repo_sources: Official homepage development section links to CVS on SourceForge; official SourceForge project has a Code tab for SLASH'EM.
tags_sources: Official homepage and SourceForge project page describe SLASH'EM as a NetHack variant, roguelike, single-player RPG with terminal/console interfaces.
